name_en: 🌷With complete original green box packaging🌷【New】Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Tote
name_cn:
🌷With complete original green box packaging🌷【New】Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Tote
Presenting the new Gucci Horsebit 1955 bag under the vision of Creative Director Sabato De Sarno, interpreting the double ring and rectangular design that inherits the brand's equestrian roots. This small tote is crafted from new GG canvas, featuring a unique heat-pressed pattern for a soft and exquisite touch.
Beige and dark brown GG canvas, soft and refined touch
Gucci Rosso Ancora leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Front detail with horsebit
Handle height: 4cm
Detachable leather shoulder strap (47-55cm)
Strap length: 95-110cm
Flap closure
Weight: approx. 0.45kg
Model: 815206
Dimensions: 22.6(L) x 12.7(W) x 5.6cm(H)
Color: Brown PVC/Original leather
Italian creation
